category_sources: GNOME wiki archive describes it as an enhanced gettext PO file editor for GNOME.
source_facts.description says gtranslator is a GNOME gettext PO file editor.
display_name_sources: GNOME wiki archive states it was formerly known as Gtranslator and is now GNOME Translation Editor.
source_facts.name preserves the package/formula name gtranslator.
docs_sources: Official GNOME GitLab project is the source-level project surface.
Official GNOME wiki archive is the app documentation page with features and development resources.
repo_sources: Official GNOME wiki archive lists GitLab and the git clone URL for GNOME/gtranslator.
tags_sources: Official GNOME wiki archive lists translation-memory, PO file, and GNOME desktop features.
source_facts.description supports gettext, PO files, and GNOME tags.
